testcase.name: inserer_un_json_invalide_leve_une_exception_explicite
testcase.system-out: JSON rejete comme attendu : JSON invalide : Unrecognized token 'ceci': was expecting (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 5]
